svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="能力地图演进" id="tr2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-434" dy="-134" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="stg1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="阶段一：纯后端
只盯自己一摊" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="200" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="后端 · 专家级" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="60" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1b" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;align=center;" value="其余端 · 不碰" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="60" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stg2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="阶段二：全栈
前后端打通" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="200" x="290" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="后端 · 专家级" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="310" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2b" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="前端 · 能交付" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="310" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stg3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="阶段三：产品开发专家
一人扛全链路" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="240" x="540" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="后端 · 专家级（锚点）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="560" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3b" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="前端 / DevOps / 运营 · 能交付" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="560" y="145" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3c" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="产品定义 · AI 补到够用" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="560" y="195" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ar12" edge="1" parent="1" source="stg1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="stg2" value="AI 补前端"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ar23" edge="1" parent="1" source="stg2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="stg3" value="AI 削平其余门槛"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="锚点不变：后端始终是专家级。变化的只是其余端从「不碰」到「能交付」到「够用」。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="680" x="80" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="warn" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#b45309;fontSize=12;" value="别贪：五条都专家级不现实。一条专家、其余够用，就是合理形态。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="680" x="80" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: 锚点不变：后端始终是专家级。变化的只是其余端从「不碰」到「能交付」到「够用」。

div.div: 别贪：五条都专家级不现实。一条专家、其余够用，就是合理形态。
